title: rosa nutkana subsp. nutkana
intro: Rosa nutkana subsp. nutkana, also known as Nootka rose, is a fragrant and flowering shrub native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Rosa nutkana subsp. nutkana include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
